label: Ledgerkeep Chamber
description: Ledgerkeep Chamber serves as the principal rented sleeping room of The Black Ledger, set behind soot-darkened brick and riveted iron bands that temper sound from the taproom. Its walls carry limewashed tally-marks and ink-stamped cautions against interdiction nights, aligning private lodging with Cindervale’s culture of posted ordinance and quarantine rule. A narrow bedframe and a bolted chest stand beneath a high slit window glazed with smoke-stained panes and fitted with an interior bar. The door is reinforced with iron strapwork and a plain seal-plate for license tags, reflecting the tavern’s lawbound character.
